title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub — Notion Template
description:
Stop juggling five different apps just to understand your own finances. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion template that brings your investment portfolio, budget, dividends, net worth, and financial goals into a single, beautifully organized workspace.

Built for intermediate Notion users — no complex formula-building required. Everything is pre-configured so you can start tracking on day one.

Track every stock, ETF, crypto, and alternative asset with automatic ROI and unrealized gain calculations. Log every dividend and distribution so you never lose sight of your passive income progress. Monitor monthly income vs. expenses with a clear budget dashboard. Set financial goals with visual progress bars and built-in timelines. Capture monthly net worth snapshots to watch your wealth grow over time.

Whether you're building toward financial independence, chasing a $2,000/month dividend stream, or simply trying to know where your money goes each month — this template gives you the clarity and control you've been missing. Perfect for investors, savers, and anyone serious about their financial future.
features: 7 fully built, pre-configured databases covering investments, transactions, dividends, budget, accounts, goals, and net worth — zero setup required.
Automatic ROI, unrealized gain/loss, and total return calculations built directly into the Investment Portfolio database so you always know your real performance.
Dividend & Distribution Log with quarterly grouping and rollup totals, making tax season prep and passive income tracking effortless.
Visual financial goal tracker with auto-calculated progress bars and 'months to goal' formulas to keep your savings and investment milestones on track.
Monthly net worth snapshot system that records assets, liabilities, and net worth over time so you can visualize your wealth-building journey at a glance.

faq.q: Do I need to be an advanced Notion user to use this template?
faq.a: No. This template is designed for intermediate Notion users who are comfortable with databases and filters but don't want to build complex formulas from scratch. All formulas, relations, and rollups are already configured — just duplicate the template and start entering your data.

faq.q: Does this template automatically sync with my brokerage or bank accounts?
faq.a: No — this is a manual-entry Notion template, not a live data feed. You update prices, balances, and transactions yourself. This actually gives you full control and privacy, and most users find that a quick weekly or monthly update is all it takes to stay on top of their finances.

faq.q: Can I track multiple accounts and asset types, including crypto and real estate?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Accounts database supports taxable brokerages, 401(k)s, IRAs, HSAs, crypto exchanges, checking, savings, and real estate accounts. The Investment Portfolio database handles stocks, ETFs, crypto, bonds, real estate, and alternative assets all in one place.
